# GitHub Copilot Repository Instructions

The canonical workspace agent instructions for this repo live in `AGENTS.md` at the repository root.

When working in this repository, read `AGENTS.md` for session start protocol, read/write rules, and memory-file responsibilities. In particular, for non-trivial tasks also consult `PROJECT_PROGRESS.md` and `WORKING_MEMORY.md` before making project-specific suggestions or edits.
If `memory/index.md` exists and the target project or area is unclear, read it before project-specific work.

Do not duplicate rules here. Add Copilot-specific overrides below only when they genuinely differ from the canonical protocol.

## Copilot Specific Overrides

_(none)_
